settings_language_hint: Choose the app language. "System" follows your browser language.
draw_hint_empty: Tap the table or drag an arrow to start.
draw_many_strokes_warning: Many strokes ({count}) — colors will start repeating. Consider splitting into multiple exercises.
archive_empty_no_match: No exercise matches the current filters.
playlists_empty_split: Pick or create a training list.
playlists_play_hint_paired: Send exercises one by one to the TV
playlists_empty_in_list: No exercise in this training list yet.
settings_about_hint: Digital tactics board for table tennis coaches. Draw on the tablet, display on the TV.
settings_display_dark_hint: Dark background, ideal for dim halls.
settings_pro_coming: Payment via Stripe — coming once we're live.
settings_tv_connected_hint_prefix: Changes to the current exercise are sent to the TV automatically. Go back to
settings_tv_scanner_hint: Point the camera at the QR code on the TV.
settings_tv_pair_hint: Scan the QR code on the TV or enter the 4-digit code.
settings_tv_error_unknown_code: Unknown code. Reopen the TV and use the new code.
settings_tv_error_already_paired: TV is already paired with another tablet.
settings_tv_error_connection_failed: No server reachable. Start dev server (`npm run server:dev`).
account_info_reset_sent: If the address is registered, we have sent a reset link.
verify_email_intro: We've sent a verification link to {email}.
verify_email_hint: Click the link in the email to activate your account. The link expires in 24 hours.
paywall_title: Unlimited exercises with TT Playbook Pro
paywall_sub: You've created your {limit} free exercises. Unlock Pro for unlimited.
paywall_note: Payment via Stripe — coming soon. No in-app purchases, no store cut.
paywall_existing_account: Already have an account? Sign in →
tv_pair_hint_prefix: Scan the QR code on your tablet or enter the code manually at
settings_hint_pick_left: Please pick a section from the list on the left.
settings_pro_signin_hint: Sign in to subscribe to Pro.
settings_tv_howto_step1: Open tv.tt-playbook.de in the browser of your Smart TV (or a laptop/stick PC plugged into the TV).
settings_tv_howto_step2: The TV displays a QR code and a four-digit number.
settings_tv_howto_step3: On this tablet or phone, scan the QR code or type in the four-digit number.
settings_tv_howto_step4: Once paired, every exercise you draw or open from the archive shows up on the TV in full size — perfect for the hall and on-court coaching.
settings_tv_howto_step5: Tablet and TV must be on the same Wi-Fi. The connection stays active until you disconnect or close the TV tab.
help_intro: TT Playbook Trainer replaces the physical whiteboard in the hall. Draw exercises on a tablet or phone and beam them live to a TV — with clearly numbered arrows, stroke-type codes and an exercise library you can recall any time.
help_s1_register: Create account: Settings → Account → "Sign up". Confirm your email via the link sent to you.
help_s1_signin: Sign in: Log in with email + password. The Free plan allows up to 5 exercises, one training list, and full access to drawing and TV features.
help_s1_pro: Unlock Pro: Settings → Pro → choose a plan (monthly or yearly). Removes the 5-exercise limit, unlocks unlimited training lists and custom stroke codes (coming).
help_s2_intro: The main view is the table tennis table in portrait orientation (player at the bottom, opponent at the top).
help_s2_draw: Draw an arrow: Tap and drag on the table, or tap twice in a row (start + end).
help_s2_colors: Numbering + colors: Each arrow gets the next number automatically. Color follows the number: 1=Red, 2=Green, 3=Yellow, 4=Purple, 5=Orange, 6=Cyan. From stroke 7 onwards colors repeat — a subtle hint makes that visible.
help_s2_tag: Tag stroke type: After drawing, the steps panel opens on the right. Pick stroke codes there (e.g. SV, FH-L, BH-BLK, FLIP, …) — they show in your selected language.
help_s2_freetext: Free text: Per stroke you can add a comment (e.g. "keep it short", "to the wide corner").
help_s2_reps: Reps + duration: Top of the steps panel: preset buttons 5/10/15/20 reps and 5/10/15 minutes, or free input.
help_s2_delete: Delete an arrow: Tap the arrow → trash icon in the panel. Remaining arrows are renumbered automatically.
help_s2_undo: Undo: "Undo" button (curved arrow) in the panel header — removes the last arrow.
help_s2_new: New exercise: "+ New" button in the toolbar resets the table.
help_s3_save: Set a name (toolbar at the top), then "Save". Free plan: max 5 exercises — when you try to save a 6th, the Pro prompt appears.
help_s3_overwrite: Editing an existing exercise + "Save" again overwrites it.
help_s4_overview: Overview: All saved exercises with mini preview (thumbnail), name, stroke count.
help_s4_search: Search: Search box at the top filters by name.
help_s4_filter: Filter: Chips per stroke type — only shows exercises that contain that code.
help_s4_actions: Per-exercise actions: Three-dot menu on the card → Rename, Duplicate, Delete.
help_s4_open: Open: Tap a card to load the exercise for editing.
help_s5_intro: Bundle multiple exercises you can play back-to-back on the TV — perfect for a training session.
help_s5_create: Create: Training lists → "+ New list" → enter a name.
help_s5_add: Add exercises: Inside the list, "+ Add exercise" → pick from the archive.
help_s5_reorder: Reorder: Drag & drop exercises within the list.
help_s5_play: Play on TV: "Play on TV" starts the player on the paired TV. Next/Previous via buttons or arrow keys. Step-by-step navigation inside an exercise. Escape exits.
help_s5_limit: Free plan: 1 training list. Pro: unlimited.
help_s6_intro: Tablet/phone controls the display, the TV (or a laptop/stick PC plugged into the TV) shows the exercise full screen.
help_s6_step1: Open tv.tt-playbook.de in the TV browser (Smart TV, stick PC, laptop on HDMI).
help_s6_step2: The TV shows a QR code and a four-digit code.
help_s6_step3: On the tablet/phone: Settings → TV connection → either scan the QR code (camera icon) or type the code by hand.
help_s6_step4: Once paired, every exercise you draw or open from the archive shows up on the TV instantly.
help_s6_step5_wifi: Requirement: Both devices on the same Wi-Fi.
help_s6_step6_theme: Theme sync: Switching the tablet between light and dark also flips the TV.
help_s7_free: Free: 5 exercises, 1 training list, full drawing and TV mode.
help_s7_pro: Pro: Unlimited exercises, unlimited training lists, custom stroke codes (planned), cloud sync (planned).
help_s7_buy: Subscribe: Settings → Pro → click a plan card → complete Stripe Checkout. You're returned to the app and Pro is active immediately.
help_s7_manage: Manage: Settings → Account → "Manage subscription" opens the Stripe customer portal: update payment method, view invoices, cancel.
help_s7_cancel: Cancel: The subscription continues to the end of the paid period — no mid-month loss of access. After that, Free mode.
help_s8_account: Account: Sign in, sign up, reset password, Pro status, manage subscription, log out.
help_s8_language: Language: German, English, Spanish or system language. Affects the app, stroke codes and emails.
help_s8_tv: TV connection: Scan QR, enter code, disconnect.
help_s9_pair_first: Pair the tablet with the TV before training — the connection stays up for the whole session.
help_s9_lists: Build often-used exercises once and drop them into a training list — at the next session, just "Play on TV".
help_s9_freetext: Use the steps panel free text to leave coaching hints per stroke ("step away from the table", "short serve").
help_s9_theme: Bright halls → display Light. Dark halls → Dark. The tablet drives both, including the TV.
help_s10_contact: Questions, requests, problems: info@ok-marked.com. When reporting a bug, a short note about what you tried and what happened instead helps a lot.
